title: Restrict viewing to files column
excerpt:
Hi! 
It would be so useful if we can “Restrict view” some column files, and limit viewing for responsibles…

posts.author: Fatemak (Fatema)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
It would be so useful if we can “Restrict view” some column files, and limit viewing for responsibles…

Screen Shot 2021-10-04 at 5.43.11 PM1064×583 65.9 KB

posts.author: egronberger (Erik Gronberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I´ve asked the same feature, very useful, don´t know why they didn´t add it.

As for me it is really important, here is my workarrownd:

I host the files in a google drive folder and don´t give the users which I don´t want to see the files the permission in the drive app to see them.

What do you think?

posts.author: matts (Matt S)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you put a link to the drive folder in a Monday column? I’m asking because it would be nice to be able to look at an entry on Monday and then have the files accessible right there.

I would also love to see Monday implement a “restrict viewing” options for files column, and all column types for that matter.
